stemHtml: One of the advantages of a Satellite Based Augmentation System (SBAS) over a Ground Based Augmentation System (GBAS) is..

options.a: an SBAS does not, like a GBAS, need ground stations for the estimation of the pseudo-range corrections.
options.b: the coverage area of an SBAS is much larger than that of a GBAS.
options.c: the rate at which the pseudo-range corrections reach the users is much higher for a GBAS than for an SBAS.
options.d: the pseudo-range corrections of an SBAS are much more accurate than those of a GBAS.
